environment_vs_shell_truth.gmd_dev_runtime: truthful healthy runtime: Argo gmd-dev can be Synced/Healthy from the GitOps chart and already-pulled upstream images without /workspace/repos/gmd-app existing.
environment_vs_shell_truth.shared_shell: build/provenance substrate: image build and candidate paths inspect /workspace/repos/* and can fail even while gmd-dev runtime stays healthy.
environment_vs_shell_truth.ui_behavior: Environments runtime health is truthful for deployed Argo state. It is missing a separate projection if it implies build readiness without surfacing shared-shell checkout/provenance state.
